# gbrain Influence Map

Draftpaper-loop does not depend on or vendor gbrain code. The following design patterns were reviewed because they were more mature than ad hoc alternatives:

- capability-pack routing evaluation;
- task-scoped evidence retrieval and token budgeting;
- capture, replay and calibration structure;
- optional migration protection patterns.

Doctor, bibliography handling, project transactions, user revision and the scientific workflow remain native Draftpaper-loop implementations.
